description: Composition Grey and green striped polo neck T-shirt made of 100% polyester, has a ribbed spread collar, half buttoned placket, short sleeves with ribbed cuffs and a vented hem Fit Regular Wash care Do not machine wash Wash with like colours using a mild detergent only Wash and iron inside out Do not use fabric softener Do not iron on motif/print/trims/logo Lightweight and quick drying, this polo neck T-shirt from adidas gives a great comfortable feel and looks stylish. This tee keeps you dry and comfortable throughout an active day or during hectic training schedules. Team this with jeans or chinos and adidas shoes for a round of golf or for an action filled day in the Sports club. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18"
